refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: [counts, xcells, ycells] = imhist2(x, y) [counts, xcells, ycells] = imhist2(x, y, bins)

listitem.para: Input arrays or vectors containing paired sample values.
Scalar bin count or two-element bin count. Default is [32 32].
2-D histogram count matrix. counts(i, j) is the number of samples in x-bin i and y-bin j.
Bin center values for the x and y dimensions.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: imhist2 counts paired values from two same-size arrays. For images, this is useful for visualizing relationships between channels, such as red-vs-green intensity distribution in a color image.

refsection.title: Examples
